summary: Authentication implementation demonstrates excellent security practices with comprehensive OAuth flow, JWT management, refresh token rotation, and proper domain restrictions. All critical security requirements met with minor recommendations for enhancement.

owasp_authentication_guidelines.passwords_tokens_not_logged: PASS - Tokens are not logged, only email addresses and debug messages without sensitive data
owasp_authentication_guidelines.secure_token_generation: PASS - Uses secrets.token_urlsafe(64) for refresh tokens, secrets.token_hex(16) for JTI
owasp_authentication_guidelines.proper_token_storage: PASS - Refresh tokens stored as SHA256 hashes, not plaintext
owasp_authentication_guidelines.session_timeout_implemented: PASS - JWT expiry 1 hour, refresh token expiry 7 days (configurable)
owasp_authentication_guidelines.account_lockout: N/A - OAuth-based authentication, handled by Google

jwt_security.strong_algorithm: PASS - Uses HS256 (configurable), validated to be at least 32 characters
jwt_security.appropriate_expiry: PASS - 1 hour for access tokens (configurable via JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS)
jwt_security.required_claims_present: PASS - sub, email, role, exp, iat, jti all present
jwt_security.signature_validated: PASS - jwt.decode validates signature before payload access
jwt_security.no_sensitive_data: PASS - Only stores user_id, email, role - no secrets or passwords

oauth_implementation.state_parameter_csrf: PASS - State stored in database with expiry, validated and marked as used
oauth_implementation.token_exchange_server_side: PASS - Exchange happens in backend, uses client_secret
oauth_implementation.google_token_verified: PASS - Calls Google userinfo API to verify token and get user data
oauth_implementation.domain_restriction_enforced: PASS - Checks @your-domain.com domain server-side with clear error message

refresh_token_security.stored_as_hash: PASS - SHA256 hash stored in database using hash_refresh_token()
refresh_token_security.rotation_implemented: PASS - rotate_refresh_token() revokes old and creates new token
refresh_token_security.separate_from_access: PASS - Refresh tokens stored in database, access tokens are stateless JWT

domain_restriction.clear_error_message: PASS - Returns 'Email domain not allowed. Must be @your-domain.com'
domain_restriction.cannot_be_bypassed: PASS - Check happens after Google OAuth verification, cannot bypass

rate_limiting.auth_endpoints_rate_limited: PARTIAL - RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE configured in settings, but middleware not implemented in reviewed files
rate_limiting.prevents_brute_force: PARTIAL - Configuration exists but no implementation visible
rate_limiting.appropriate_headers: PARTIAL - No rate limit headers observed in responses

error_handling.consistent_format: PASS - HTTPException with status codes and detail messages
error_handling.proper_status_codes: PASS - 401 for auth failures, 403 for forbidden, 500 for server errors
error_handling.no_stack_traces: PASS - Exceptions logged with logger.exception() but only generic errors to client

audit_logging.login_attempts_logged: PASS - Logs successful login, domain rejection, failed auth attempts
audit_logging.failed_auth_logged: PASS - Logs invalid tokens, expired tokens, wrong domain
audit_logging.no_secrets_in_logs: PASS - Only logs email, user_id, truncated state parameters

code_quality.type_hints_present: PASS - Comprehensive type hints throughout all modules
code_quality.async_await_correct: PASS - All database operations use async/await, httpx.AsyncClient used
code_quality.no_hardcoded_secrets: PASS - All secrets loaded from settings/environment variables
code_quality.clean_separation: PASS - Service layer, middleware, routes clearly separated

xss_csrf_protection.tokens_not_in_url: PASS - Tokens in Authorization header and httponly cookies
xss_csrf_protection.httponly_cookies: PASS - Refresh token cookie set with httponly=True
xss_csrf_protection.cors_configured: PASS - ALLOWED_ORIGINS in settings, configurable per environment

runtime_validation.import_test: SKIP - Dependencies not installed in current environment
runtime_validation.reserved_names: PASS - No SQLAlchemy reserved names (metadata, registry, query) used. QACheckpoint.metadata mapped to 'checkpoint_metadata' to avoid conflict
runtime_validation.async_patterns: PASS - No time.sleep(), no requests module, all uses httpx.AsyncClient with async/await
runtime_validation.type_hints: PASS - Comprehensive type hints with Optional, Dict, List, UUID, AsyncSession types

security_test_cases.wrong_domain_rejected: PASS - Domain check in verify_google_token raises AuthenticationError
security_test_cases.missing_token_401: PASS - HTTPBearer security scheme requires token, returns 401 if missing
security_test_cases.non_admin_access_denied: PASS - get_current_admin and require_admin decorators check role
security_test_cases.logout_invalidates_tokens: PASS - revoke_refresh_token sets is_revoked=True, revoked_at timestamp
security_test_cases.refresh_token_single_use: PASS - rotate_refresh_token revokes old before creating new

issues.description: Rate limiting configuration exists in settings (RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE=60) but no middleware implementation found in reviewed files
issues.recommendation: Implement rate limiting middleware using FastAPI rate limiting or Redis-based solution

issues.description: No HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, or other security headers visible in responses
issues.recommendation: Add security headers middleware for production deployments

issues.description: Access tokens (JWT) cannot be revoked before expiry since they're stateless
issues.recommendation: Consider implementing token blacklist or shorter expiry times for high-security scenarios

positive_findings: Comprehensive OAuth state parameter implementation with database storage and single-use validation
Refresh token rotation with SHA256 hashing provides excellent security against token replay attacks
Clean separation of concerns: service layer handles business logic, middleware handles auth, routes handle HTTP
Proper async/await patterns throughout - no sync-blocking calls
Extensive audit logging with IP address and user agent tracking for forensics
Email domain restriction enforced at multiple layers with clear error messages
JWT payload minimal and contains no sensitive data beyond user_id/email/role
Settings validation ensures JWT_SECRET is at least 32 characters
Type hints comprehensive and accurate throughout codebase
Error messages are generic enough to not leak information about user existence
Cookie security properly configured with httponly, secure flag, samesite=lax
Cleanup functions provided for expired tokens and OAuth states
Multiple logout options: single device and all devices
Client info (IP, user agent) tracked for audit and security
Permission system well-implemented with decorators and dependency injection
recommendations: Implement rate limiting middleware for auth endpoints to prevent brute force attacks
Add security headers middleware (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options)
Consider implementing scheduled cleanup job for expired tokens and OAuth states
Add monitoring/alerting for failed login attempts from same IP
Consider adding device fingerprinting for refresh token validation
Document token rotation strategy in API documentation for frontend team
Consider adding email notification on new device login
Add integration tests for auth flows once environment is set up

compliance.owasp_top_10: COMPLIANT - Addresses A01 (Broken Access Control), A02 (Cryptographic Failures), A07 (Identification and Authentication Failures)
compliance.gdpr: COMPLIANT - Audit logging includes user consent flow through OAuth, PII (email) properly protected
compliance.oauth_2_0: COMPLIANT - Proper implementation of authorization code flow with state parameter

strengths: OAuth state parameter prevents CSRF attacks with database-backed validation
Refresh token rotation implements single-use pattern for maximum security
Token hashing (SHA256) prevents token reuse if database is compromised
Comprehensive error handling with appropriate HTTP status codes
Async implementation throughout with proper httpx usage
Settings validation ensures configuration is secure before startup
Clean architecture with clear boundaries between layers
Extensive type hints improve code maintainability and catch errors early

architecture_quality.service_layer: Excellent - AuthService and UserService are well-structured with single responsibility
architecture_quality.middleware: Excellent - Authentication middleware properly integrates with FastAPI dependency injection
architecture_quality.routes: Excellent - Clean REST endpoints with proper request/response models
architecture_quality.database: Excellent - Proper use of async SQLAlchemy with foreign keys and indexes
architecture_quality.configuration: Excellent - Pydantic settings with validation and environment awareness
